name: She Rises - Safe Haven for Empowerment
tagline: Every woman has a story... here we help you write the next chapter
motto: When SHE rises, we all rise
mission: She Rises provides safe housing, supportive services, and reentry resources that empower women experiencing homelessness and rebuilding after incarceration.
vision: A community where women have the stability, tools, and encouragement to write her next chapter
